mapper.sql: resource_rel_detail_id, resource_id, rel_resource_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, com_acct_id, rel_type_name, rel_status, rel_resource_info
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ss_resource_rel_detail ( resource_rel_detail_id, resource_id, rel_resource_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, com_acct_id, rel_type_name, rel_status, rel_resource_info ) VALUES
( #{item.resourceRelDetailId}, #{item.resourceId}, #{item.relResourceId}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.comAcctId}, #{item.relTypeName}, #{item.relStatus}, #{item.relResourceInfo} )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM ss_resource_rel_detail WHERE 1=1
AND rel_resource_info::jsonb->>'viewResourceId' = CAST(#{viewResourceId} AS TEXT)
AND JSON_EXTRACT(rel_resource_info, '$.viewResourceId') = #{viewResourceId}
AND JSON_VALUE(rel_resource_info, '$.viewResourceId') = TO_CHAR(#{viewResourceId})
AND rel_resource_info::jsonb->>'viewResourceId' = CAST(#{viewResourceId} AS TEXT)
mapper.select:
SELECT rrd.resource_rel_detail_id, rrd.resource_id, rrd.rel_resource_id, rrd.create_by, rrd.create_time, rrd.update_by, rrd.update_time, rrd.com_acct_id, rrd.rel_type_name, rrd.rel_status, rrd.rel_resource_info, r1.resource_type, r2.resource_type AS rel_resource_type, r2.resource_biz_type AS rel_resource_biz_type FROM ss_resource_rel_detail rrd LEFT JOIN ss_resource r1 ON rrd.resource_id = r1.resource_id LEFT JOIN ss_resource r2 ON rrd.rel_resource_id = r2.resource_id WHERE 1=1
AND rrd.rel_resource_info::jsonb->>'viewResourceId' = CAST(#{viewResourceId} AS TEXT)
AND JSON_EXTRACT(rrd.rel_resource_info, '$.viewResourceId') = #{viewResourceId}
AND JSON_VALUE(rrd.rel_resource_info, '$.viewResourceId') = TO_CHAR(#{viewResourceId})
AND rrd.rel_resource_info::jsonb->>'viewResourceId' = CAST(#{viewResourceId} AS TEXT)
ORDER BY rrd.create_time DESC

SELECT rrd.resource_rel_detail_id, rrd.resource_id, rrd.rel_resource_id, rrd.create_by, rrd.create_time, rrd.update_by, rrd.update_time, rrd.com_acct_id, rrd.rel_type_name, rrd.rel_status, rrd.rel_resource_info, r1.resource_type, r1.resource_code, r1.resource_name, r1.resource_desc, r1.resource_biz_type, r2.resource_type AS rel_resource_type, r2.resource_biz_type AS rel_resource_biz_type FROM ss_resource_rel_detail rrd LEFT JOIN ss_resource r1 ON rrd.resource_id = r1.resource_id LEFT JOIN ss_resource r2 ON rrd.rel_resource_id = r2.resource_id WHERE rrd.resource_id = #{resourceId} ORDER BY rrd.create_time DESC
